'''togafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leafen|leafen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leafen|leafen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| togafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:togafithi|togafithi]] || [[word:togafiji|togafiji]] || [[word:togafishi|togafishi]] || [[word:togafiki|togafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:togafuthuthu|togafuthuthu]] || [[word:togafujuju|togafujuju]] || [[word:togafushushu|togafushushu]] || [[word:togafukuku|togafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:togafuthu|togafuthu]] || [[word:togafuju|togafuju]] || [[word:togafushu|togafushu]] || [[word:togafuku|togafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:togafufthuf|togafufthuf]] || [[word:togafufjuf|togafufjuf]] || [[word:togafufshuf|togafufshuf]] || [[word:togafufkuf|togafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:togafethe|togafethe]] || [[word:togafeje|togafeje]] || [[word:togafeshe|togafeshe]] || [[word:togafeke|togafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:togafothotho|togafothotho]] || [[word:togafojojo|togafojojo]] || [[word:togafoshosho|togafoshosho]] || [[word:togafokoko|togafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:togafotho|togafotho]] || [[word:togafojo|togafojo]] || [[word:togafosho|togafosho]] || [[word:togafoko|togafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:togafofthof|togafofthof]] || [[word:togafofjof|togafofjof]] || [[word:togafofshof|togafofshof]] || [[word:togafofkof|togafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:togafÃŸfthÃŸf|togafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfjÃŸf|togafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfshÃŸf|togafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfkÃŸf|togafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:togafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|togafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|togafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|togafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|togafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:togafÃŸfthÃŸf|togafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfjÃŸf|togafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfshÃŸf|togafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfkÃŸf|togafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:togafÃŸfthÃŸf|togafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfjÃŸf|togafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfshÃŸf|togafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togafÃŸfkÃŸf|togafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:togafÃḊthÃḊ|togafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:togafÃḊjÃḊ|togafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:togafÃḊshÃḊ|togafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:togafÃḊkÃḊ|togafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:togafathatha|togafathatha]] || [[word:togafajaja|togafajaja]] || [[word:togafashasha|togafashasha]] || [[word:togafakaka|togafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:togafatha|togafatha]] || [[word:togafaja|togafaja]] || [[word:togafasha|togafasha]] || [[word:togafaka|togafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:togafafthaf|togafafthaf]] || [[word:togafafjaf|togafafjaf]] || [[word:togafafshaf|togafafshaf]] || [[word:togafafkaf|togafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:togafasha|togafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:togafshÃḋsha|togafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togafrosha|togafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togafmusha|togafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:togafyasha|togafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogafnkshÃḋsha|gotogafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogafnkrosha|gotogafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogafnkmusha|gotogafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogafnkyasha|gotogafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:togagafasha|togagafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togagafshÃḋsha|togagafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togagafrosha|togagafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togagafmusha|togagafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togagafyasha|togagafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogagafnkshÃḋsha|gotogagafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogagafnkrosha|gotogagafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogagafnkmusha|gotogagafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogagafnkyasha|gotogagafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tegÃḊfasha|tegÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tegÃḊfshÃḋsha|tegÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tegÃḊfrosha|tegÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tegÃḊfmusha|tegÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tegÃḊfyasha|tegÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotegÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gotegÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotegÃḊfnkrosha|gotegÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotegÃḊfnkmusha|gotegÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotegÃḊfnkyasha|gotegÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:togfafasha|togfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togfafshÃḋsha|togfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togfafrosha|togfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togfafmusha|togfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togfafyasha|togfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogfafnkshÃḋsha|gotogfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogfafnkrosha|gotogfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogfafnkmusha|gotogfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogfafnkyasha|gotogfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
